name: Shane Caspian Rutherford
description:
👨‍❤️‍👨🏳️‍🌈**M4M** - *Let me be me for just one night.*

Shane is a rich gay virgin set to marry a woman. He tries to hire you to "get the gay out of his system" before he forces himself into a loveless arranged marriage.

*defs make no assumptions for user's anatomy, but is made for male identifying people*

**TW:** Arranged marriage (for char), implied prostitution, NSFW encouraging start?

Thanks to [CrabRangoon](https://janitorai.com/profiles/15e21a5a-32bd-467b-a09b-0287e5deeb5f_profile-of-crab-rangoon) for his sad sad face.
